name: agent-flow-lite
description: Agent Flow Lite governance entrypoint for Harness Lab

scripts.frontend:test:critical: npm --prefix frontend run test -- --run --isolate src/__tests__/App.spec.ts src/__tests__/views/ChatTerminal.spec.ts src/__tests__/auth/login.spec.ts
scripts.backend:test:critical: cd backend && uv run pytest -q tests/test_auth.py tests/test_chat_citation.py tests/test_chat_scoped.py tests/test_workflow_api.py tests/test_knowledge_dimension_mismatch.py
scripts.build: npm run frontend:type-check && npm run frontend:build
scripts.test: npm run frontend:test:critical && npm run backend:test:critical
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.docs:impact:json: git -c safe.directory=* status --porcelain=v1 -uall > .claude/.docs-impact-json-status && node scripts/docs-verify.mjs --status-file .claude/.docs-impact-json-status --impact-only --format json
scripts.req:complete: git -c safe.directory=* status --porcelain=v1 -uall > .claude/.req-complete-status && node scripts/req-cli.mjs complete --status-file .claude/.req-complete-status
